description_for_human: Access Daloopa financial data, metrics, and source documents via the Daloopa API.
description_for_model: Provides access to Daloopa's financial data platform via its REST API. Use this plugin to search for companies by ticker or name, list available financial metrics and KPI series for a company, retrieve specific financial data points with source-filing hyperlinks for auditability, and search source SEC filings and documents by keyword. Covers 1200+ standardized metrics with every data point linked to its original source filing.

functions.name: search_companies
functions.description: Search for companies by ticker symbol or name to get company metadata, IDs, and available reporting periods via Daloopa API.

keyword.description: Company name or ticker symbol to search for (e.g., 'AAPL' or 'Apple')

functions.name: get_series
functions.description: List available financial metrics and KPI series for a company. Returns standardized and company-specific metrics that can be queried for historical data.

functions.name: get_fundamentals
functions.description: Retrieve specific financial data points for a company, with every value hyperlinked to its source filing for full auditability.

series_id.description: Daloopa series ID for the specific metric (obtained from get_series)

functions.name: search_documents
functions.description: Search source SEC filings and documents for a company by keyword. Returns matched snippets with references to original filings.

keywords.description: Keyword to search within source filings and documents
